# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"

before_script:
  - echo "Deploy tag will be: $DEPLOY_TAG"

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - ./run_tests.sh

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - ./deploy_to_production.sh
  only:
    - merge_requests
  tags:
    - production
  when: manual
